<a id="class-tiledata"></a>

# TileData

**Inherits:** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Settings for a single tile in a [TileSet](class_tileset.md#class-tileset).

## Description

**TileData** object represents a single tile in a [TileSet](class_tileset.md#class-tileset). It is usually edited using the tileset editor, but it can be modified at runtime using [TileMapLayer._tile_data_runtime_update()](class_tilemaplayer.md#class-tilemaplayer-private-method-tile-data-runtime-update).

## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-tiledata-property-flip-h"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **flip_h** = `false` [🔗](#class-tiledata-property-flip-h)

-  **set_flip_h**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **get_flip_h**()

If `true`, the tile will have its texture flipped horizontally.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-property-flip-v"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **flip_v** = `false` [🔗](#class-tiledata-property-flip-v)

-  **set_flip_v**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **get_flip_v**()

If `true`, the tile will have its texture flipped vertically.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-property-material"></a>

[Material](class_material.md#class-material) **material** [🔗](#class-tiledata-property-material)

-  **set_material**(value: [Material](class_material.md#class-material))
- [Material](class_material.md#class-material) **get_material**()

The [Material](class_material.md#class-material) to use for this **TileData**. This can be a [CanvasItemMaterial](class_canvasitemmaterial.md#class-canvasitemmaterial) to use the default shader, or a [ShaderMaterial](class_shadermaterial.md#class-shadermaterial) to use a custom shader.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-property-modulate"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **modulate** = `Color(1, 1, 1, 1)` [🔗](#class-tiledata-property-modulate)

-  **set_modulate**(value: [Color](class_color.md#class-color))
- [Color](class_color.md#class-color) **get_modulate**()

Color modulation of the tile.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-property-probability"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **probability** = `1.0` [🔗](#class-tiledata-property-probability)

-  **set_probability**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_probability**()

Relative probability of this tile being selected when drawing a pattern of random tiles.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-property-terrain"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **terrain** = `-1` [🔗](#class-tiledata-property-terrain)

-  **set_terrain**(value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_terrain**()

ID of the terrain from the terrain set that the tile uses.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-property-terrain-set"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **terrain_set** = `-1` [🔗](#class-tiledata-property-terrain-set)

-  **set_terrain_set**(value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_terrain_set**()

ID of the terrain set that the tile uses.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-property-texture-origin"></a>

[Vector2i](class_vector2i.md#class-vector2i) **texture_origin** = `Vector2i(0, 0)` [🔗](#class-tiledata-property-texture-origin)

-  **set_texture_origin**(value: [Vector2i](class_vector2i.md#class-vector2i))
- [Vector2i](class_vector2i.md#class-vector2i) **get_texture_origin**()

Offsets the position of where the tile is drawn.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-property-transpose"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **transpose** = `false` [🔗](#class-tiledata-property-transpose)

-  **set_transpose**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **get_transpose**()

If `true`, the tile will display transposed, i.e. with horizontal and vertical texture UVs swapped.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-property-y-sort-origin"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **y_sort_origin** = `0` [🔗](#class-tiledata-property-y-sort-origin)

-  **set_y_sort_origin**(value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_y_sort_origin**()

Vertical point of the tile used for determining y-sorted order.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-property-z-index"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **z_index** = `0` [🔗](#class-tiledata-property-z-index)

-  **set_z_index**(value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_z_index**()

Ordering index of this tile, relative to [TileMapLayer](class_tilemaplayer.md#class-tilemaplayer).

---

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-tiledata-method-add-collision-polygon"></a>

 **add_collision_polygon**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-add-collision-polygon)

Adds a collision polygon to the tile on the given TileSet physics layer.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-add-occluder-polygon"></a>

 **add_occluder_polygon**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-add-occluder-polygon)

Adds an occlusion polygon to the tile on the TileSet occlusion layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-get-collision-polygon-one-way-margin"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_collision_polygon_one_way_margin**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), polygon_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-get-collision-polygon-one-way-margin)

Returns the one-way margin (for one-way platforms) of the polygon at index `polygon_index` for TileSet physics layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-get-collision-polygon-points"></a>

[PackedVector2Array](class_packedvector2array.md#class-packedvector2array) **get_collision_polygon_points**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), polygon_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-get-collision-polygon-points)

Returns the points of the polygon at index `polygon_index` for TileSet physics layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-get-collision-polygons-count"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_collision_polygons_count**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-get-collision-polygons-count)

Returns how many polygons the tile has for TileSet physics layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-get-constant-angular-velocity"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_constant_angular_velocity**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-get-constant-angular-velocity)

Returns the constant angular velocity applied to objects colliding with this tile.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-get-constant-linear-velocity"></a>

[Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **get_constant_linear_velocity**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-get-constant-linear-velocity)

Returns the constant linear velocity applied to objects colliding with this tile.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-get-custom-data"></a>

[Variant](class_variant.md#class-variant) **get_custom_data**(layer_name: [String](class_string.md#class-string))  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-get-custom-data)

Returns the custom data value for custom data layer named `layer_name`. To check if a custom data layer exists, use [has_custom_data()](#class-tiledata-method-has-custom-data).

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-get-custom-data-by-layer-id"></a>

[Variant](class_variant.md#class-variant) **get_custom_data_by_layer_id**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-get-custom-data-by-layer-id)

Returns the custom data value for custom data layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-get-navigation-polygon"></a>

[NavigationPolygon](class_navigationpolygon.md#class-navigationpolygon) **get_navigation_polygon**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), flip_h: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) = false, flip_v: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) = false, transpose: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) = false)  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-get-navigation-polygon)

Returns the navigation polygon of the tile for the TileSet navigation layer with index `layer_id`.

`flip_h`, `flip_v`, and `transpose` allow transforming the returned polygon.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-get-occluder"></a>

[OccluderPolygon2D](class_occluderpolygon2d.md#class-occluderpolygon2d) **get_occluder**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), flip_h: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) = false, flip_v: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) = false, transpose: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) = false)  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-get-occluder)

**Deprecated:** Use [get_occluder_polygon()](#class-tiledata-method-get-occluder-polygon) instead.

Returns the occluder polygon of the tile for the TileSet occlusion layer with index `layer_id`.

`flip_h`, `flip_v`, and `transpose` allow transforming the returned polygon.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-get-occluder-polygon"></a>

[OccluderPolygon2D](class_occluderpolygon2d.md#class-occluderpolygon2d) **get_occluder_polygon**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), polygon_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), flip_h: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) = false, flip_v: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) = false, transpose: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) = false)  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-get-occluder-polygon)

Returns the occluder polygon at index `polygon_index` from the TileSet occlusion layer with index `layer_id`.

The `flip_h`, `flip_v`, and `transpose` parameters can be `true` to transform the returned polygon.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-get-occluder-polygons-count"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_occluder_polygons_count**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-get-occluder-polygons-count)

Returns the number of occluder polygons of the tile in the TileSet occlusion layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-get-terrain-peering-bit"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_terrain_peering_bit**(peering_bit: [CellNeighbor](class_tileset.md#enum-tileset-cellneighbor))  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-get-terrain-peering-bit)

Returns the tile's terrain bit for the given `peering_bit` direction. To check that a direction is valid, use [is_valid_terrain_peering_bit()](#class-tiledata-method-is-valid-terrain-peering-bit).

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-has-custom-data"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **has_custom_data**(layer_name: [String](class_string.md#class-string))  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-has-custom-data)

Returns whether there exists a custom data layer named `layer_name`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-is-collision-polygon-one-way"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_collision_polygon_one_way**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), polygon_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-is-collision-polygon-one-way)

Returns whether one-way collisions are enabled for the polygon at index `polygon_index` for TileSet physics layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-is-valid-terrain-peering-bit"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_valid_terrain_peering_bit**(peering_bit: [CellNeighbor](class_tileset.md#enum-tileset-cellneighbor))  [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-is-valid-terrain-peering-bit)

Returns whether the given `peering_bit` direction is valid for this tile.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-remove-collision-polygon"></a>

 **remove_collision_polygon**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), polygon_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-remove-collision-polygon)

Removes the polygon at index `polygon_index` for TileSet physics layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-remove-occluder-polygon"></a>

 **remove_occluder_polygon**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), polygon_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-remove-occluder-polygon)

Removes the polygon at index `polygon_index` for TileSet occlusion layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-set-collision-polygon-one-way"></a>

 **set_collision_polygon_one_way**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), polygon_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), one_way: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-set-collision-polygon-one-way)

Enables/disables one-way collisions on the polygon at index `polygon_index` for TileSet physics layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-set-collision-polygon-one-way-margin"></a>

 **set_collision_polygon_one_way_margin**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), polygon_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), one_way_margin: [float](class_float.md#class-float)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-set-collision-polygon-one-way-margin)

Sets the one-way margin (for one-way platforms) of the polygon at index `polygon_index` for TileSet physics layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-set-collision-polygon-points"></a>

 **set_collision_polygon_points**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), polygon_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), polygon: [PackedVector2Array](class_packedvector2array.md#class-packedvector2array)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-set-collision-polygon-points)

Sets the points of the polygon at index `polygon_index` for TileSet physics layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-set-collision-polygons-count"></a>

 **set_collision_polygons_count**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), polygons_count: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-set-collision-polygons-count)

Sets the polygons count for TileSet physics layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-set-constant-angular-velocity"></a>

 **set_constant_angular_velocity**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), velocity: [float](class_float.md#class-float)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-set-constant-angular-velocity)

Sets the constant angular velocity. This does not rotate the tile. This angular velocity is applied to objects colliding with this tile.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-set-constant-linear-velocity"></a>

 **set_constant_linear_velocity**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), velocity: [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-set-constant-linear-velocity)

Sets the constant linear velocity. This does not move the tile. This linear velocity is applied to objects colliding with this tile. This is useful to create conveyor belts.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-set-custom-data"></a>

 **set_custom_data**(layer_name: [String](class_string.md#class-string), value: [Variant](class_variant.md#class-variant)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-set-custom-data)

Sets the tile's custom data value for the TileSet custom data layer with name `layer_name`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-set-custom-data-by-layer-id"></a>

 **set_custom_data_by_layer_id**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), value: [Variant](class_variant.md#class-variant)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-set-custom-data-by-layer-id)

Sets the tile's custom data value for the TileSet custom data layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-set-navigation-polygon"></a>

 **set_navigation_polygon**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), navigation_polygon: [NavigationPolygon](class_navigationpolygon.md#class-navigationpolygon)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-set-navigation-polygon)

Sets the navigation polygon for the TileSet navigation layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-set-occluder"></a>

 **set_occluder**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), occluder_polygon: [OccluderPolygon2D](class_occluderpolygon2d.md#class-occluderpolygon2d)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-set-occluder)

**Deprecated:** Use [set_occluder_polygon()](#class-tiledata-method-set-occluder-polygon) instead.

Sets the occluder for the TileSet occlusion layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-set-occluder-polygon"></a>

 **set_occluder_polygon**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), polygon_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), polygon: [OccluderPolygon2D](class_occluderpolygon2d.md#class-occluderpolygon2d)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-set-occluder-polygon)

Sets the occluder for polygon with index `polygon_index` in the TileSet occlusion layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-set-occluder-polygons-count"></a>

 **set_occluder_polygons_count**(layer_id: [int](class_int.md#class-int), polygons_count: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-set-occluder-polygons-count)

Sets the occluder polygon count in the TileSet occlusion layer with index `layer_id`.

---

<a id="class-tiledata-method-set-terrain-peering-bit"></a>

 **set_terrain_peering_bit**(peering_bit: [CellNeighbor](class_tileset.md#enum-tileset-cellneighbor), terrain: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-tiledata-method-set-terrain-peering-bit)

Sets the tile's terrain bit for the given `peering_bit` direction. To check that a direction is valid, use [is_valid_terrain_peering_bit()](#class-tiledata-method-is-valid-terrain-peering-bit).
